messageValues.message:
=You are a senior support triage analyst. Analyze every incoming support ticket and classify it.

CATEGORIES:
- Bug: The user reports something broken, crashing, not working, or behaving incorrectly
- Question: The user is asking how to do something, needs help understanding a feature, or wants guidance
- Feature: The user is requesting a new capability, enhancement, or improvement
- Billing: The user has a payment, invoice, subscription, or account access issue

PRIORITIES:
- Critical: System down, data loss, security issue, multiple users affected
- High: Major feature broken, significant business impact
- Medium: Feature partially broken, workaround exists
- Low: Minor issue, cosmetic problem, general question

SENTIMENTS:
- Frustrated: Angry language, exclamation marks, urgent tone, mentions of leaving
- Negative: Unhappy but polite, disappointed tone
- Neutral: Factual, straightforward description
- Positive: Pleased, complimentary, or enthusiastic

You MUST respond in EXACTLY this format:
CATEGORY: [Bug/Question/Feature/Billing]
PRIORITY: [Critical/High/Medium/Low]
SENTIMENT: [Frustrated/Negative/Neutral/Positive]
RESPONSE: [2-3 sentence professional response addressing their specific issue. For Bugs: acknowledge urgency and confirm investigation. For Questions: provide a helpful answer. For Features: thank them and confirm it's logged. For Billing: reassure them and confirm escalation.]

parameters.subject: =BUG: {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=

Bug Report

From{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }} ({{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.email }})
Subject{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
Message{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.message }}
AI Analysis{{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text }}

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }} — We're On It
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }},

Thank you for reporting this issue. We take bug reports seriously and our team is already investigating.

Your ticket has been logged as Priority: {{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text.split('\n')[1] }}

We understand how frustrating this can be, and we're working to resolve it as quickly as possible. You'll receive an update within 2 hours for critical issues, or within 24 hours for other priorities.

If your issue gets worse or you have additional details that might help us diagnose it faster, please reply to this email.

Best regards,
NEXUS Support Team

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }},

Thanks for reaching out! Here's what might help:

{{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text.split('\n')[3] }}

If this doesn't fully answer your question, just reply to this email with more details and a human agent will pick it up.

Best regards,
NEXUS Support Team

parameters.subject: =Thanks for the idea — {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }},

Great suggestion! We've logged your feature request and our product team will review it in the next sprint cycle.

{{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text.split('\n')[3] }}

Feature requests from active users like you directly shape our roadmap. We'll notify you when this gets scheduled for development.

Best regards,
NEXUS Support Team

parameters.subject: =BILLING: {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message:
=

Billing Issue Escalation

From{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }} ({{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.email }})
Subject{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.subject }}
Message{{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.message }}
AI Priority{{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text.split('\n')[1] }}
Sentiment{{ $('AI Triage Engine').item.json.text.split('\n')[2] }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.email !== 'invalid' ? $('Ticket Validator').item.json.email : 'lineshquadras@gmail.com' }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Ticket Validator').item.json.name }},

We've received your billing inquiry and it's been escalated to our billing team. They handle all payment and account matters and will respond to you directly within 4 business hours.

We understand that billing issues can feel stressful, and we want to assure you that this is being handled with priority.

If you have any invoice numbers or transaction IDs, please reply to this email with those details — it will help us resolve this faster.

Best regards,
NEXUS Support Team
